description: v3.1 参数延长版 - 更长周期提高稳定性
v3.2 保守版 - 波动率过滤
expression: momentum = ts_zscore(close - ts_mean(close, 63), 126); volatility = ts_std_dev(returns, 20); normalized_vol = ts_rank(volatility, 252); trade_when(normalized_vol > 0.3, -rank(momentum), 0)

description: v3.3 均衡版 - 中间参数组合
v3.4 成交量条件版 - 流动性驱动
expression: signal = ts_zscore(close - ts_mean(close, 63), 126); vol_filter = volume > ts_mean(volume, 20); trade_when(vol_filter, -rank(signal), 0)

description: v3.5 高频版 - 更敏感响应
